gt_sql: SELECT (CAST(SUM(T1.id) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.id)) / 4, T2.language FROM sets AS T1 INNER JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id WHERE T1.releaseDate BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2015-12-31' GROUP BY T1.releaseDate ORDER BY COUNT(T2.language) DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT (CAST(SUM(T1.id) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.id)) / 4, (
    SELECT language 
    FROM foreign_data 
    WHERE language IS NOT NULL AND language != ''
    GROUP BY language 
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC 
    LIMIT 1
) AS language
FROM sets T1
WHERE T1.releaseDate BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2015-12-31'
question: What is the annual average number of sets that were released between 1/1/2012 to 12/31/2015? Indicate the common langugage of the card.
